title: The Last War - Guns And Adventure
description: A new modpack focused on survival, firearms and new modern technologies!
body:
[

](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/guns-and-adventure) version.** ## A new modpack focused on combat, specifically, firearms, new modern technologies and much more! You will find hidden bunkers, and a lot of new features, but without a doubt, the most characteristic will be the new weapons that you will have to use if you don't want to die trying. Unlike other firearms modpacks, we have tried to make the incorporation of these weapons into Minecraft as “clean” as possible, and therefore, you will still be able to do everything you did before, only now, you will also have the possibility to make and use dozens of modern weapons. Of course, a lot of mods have also been added to improve the game experience. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/GUNS_&_ADVENTURE/BH_GUNS_&_ADVENTURE_Summary.webp) Enjoy a much more modern gameplay experience, while remaining as faithful as possible to the traditional Minecraft mechanics! Of course, now, with a multitude of firearms and amazing machinery. 🔫 Get to work and get the necessary parts to manufacture the new weapons added by Timeless and Classics Zero! 🔈 Protect yourself from enemies or well... just explore the new bunkers that won't always be alone, added by Underground Bunkers. 🔩 Create a lot of awesome machinery with Create, or its famous add-ons Create: Steam 'n' Rails, Create: Dreams & Desires, among others! 🔐 And don't forget to protect your buildings from other players or enemies, Security Craft has also been added, as well as Trapcraft. 🪨 Of course, we don't forget about many other mods that will make the gaming experience unforgettable, Biomes O' Plenty, AmbientSounds, YUNG's, Macaw's and much, much more. 🕶️ An ideal modpack to play with your friends, and make use of shaders! We have also incorporated the fantastic Complementary! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/GUNS_&_ADVENTURE/BH_GUNS_&_ADVENTURE_Faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 8GB or 8192 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 7GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/GUNS_&_ADVENTURE/BH_GUNS_&_ADVENTURE_Screenshots.webp) ![Screensots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8z96zRKL/images/93e76a94a6257df1be52f6185a352e3c82f1b519.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8z96zRKL/images/87095a50701a352a0745492dfce9fb34ac26c76e.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
